sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA No.399 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1. For orders on office objection No. 25 2. For order on CMA No. 3065/2024 3. For hearing of Main Case 30.01.2026 Mr. Furqan Mohiuddin Ansari Advocate for the Applicant Pursuant to Order dated 20.01.2026 Mr. Munawar Ali Memon, Advocate files power on behalf of the Respondent which is taken on record. The Respondent concurs that the impugned judgment is devoid of any independent discussion, deliberation and/or reasoning, hence, ought not to be sustained. In view hereof and per joint request the impugned judgment is set- aside and matter remanded back to the learned Appellate Tribunal to decide afresh. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad PS
